_description: Synthetic fixture: pool initialized with $300 USD liquidity (≈2 SOL @ $150/SOL) and 0% LP locked. Both Signal A and Signal B fire. Expected confidence = 0.80 (clamped from 1.00).
_source: Synthetic — research/03-feature-gap-2026-04-24.md §T1-1. RugWatch (machenxi + rookiester, 2024-2025) <5 SOL threshold; Sprint 24 USD-normalised to $750.
_note: Signal B gate is == 0.0% (no lock at all), not < 70%. 0% locked fires B. Both signals fire → cross-signal bonus: conf_raw = 0.45 + 0.45 + 0.10 = 1.00 → clamped to 0.80.

_expected._severity_note: 0.80 is the Critical floor ([0.80, 1.00] per severity_from_confidence). The spec's 'High floor for launch-stage' means minimum severity; both signals at 0.80 = Critical.
